title: Lead infrastructure
rationale: Supabase for lead storage, Resend for email notifications — both non-blocking so form always saves even if email fails

content: All lead forms auto-tag with service_page field matching the URL slug
Supabase table 'leads' with columns: full_name, phone, email, claim_number, help_type, message, service_page, status
API route /api/leads uses server-side Supabase client with SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY — never anon key for writes
HTML-escape all user input before email interpolation to prevent injection
Email notifications via Resend to brandonginartebusiness@gmail.com and office@cradjusters.com
Form dropdown options: denied, underpaid, new_claim, protect, appraisal, other
